## Type

## Test plan

- [ ] `uv run pytest`

## Checklist

- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]` or release section (user-visible changes)
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or personal absolute paths committed
- [ ] Security-sensitive change reviewed against [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md)
